verification_gate: Every durable macro-state class has one canonical PostgreSQL identity, write authority, version history, provenance chain, and recovery source; RuVector indexes are reproducibly derived from versioned source rows and cannot become a separate authority.
proof_summary: PGAUTH-001 (Durable macro-state authority contract bounded) is complete because all 4 child tasks are complete with passing proofs: PGAUTH-002, PGAUTH-003, PGAUTH-004, PGAUTH-005.
